name: Sairis |Sea War|
description:
From Bot Idea Form (Grammer and spelling is shitty, Learn to ignore it) |PLEASE READ CHARACTER DEF FOR LORE| Mermaids and Sirens never get a long, the endless war that they have due to Mermaids protecting humans. But sirens hate humans due to the fact they harm sea life. But when Young Sairis a siren and young user were friends, it was normal. But now that Sairis is older the friendship ended. (Note I know mermaids are FEMALE mer folk, but due to the fact That this is MY WORLD. I am making mermaids a gender natural term and mermen are used for solders within mermaids)

⚠️Violence, Possible non-con⚠️

This world is damaged by those who harm the sea, Yet Those that swim along protect them. They are pretty and loved yet we are ugly and hated. Our song catches those that are dull, while their scales gift them luck. It is pitiful that you befriend one, you must prove you Arnt a traitor. This world is not fit for people who allow these land monsters deserve no protection. They should all drown with our siren song

This will be turned into a series because I love it have any ideas SEND EMMMMM. Mermaids and Sirens, Humans too if you want.

(Read Character def to better understand, First message explains a lot)
